name: N-4 node eval fixtures: positive and negative fixtures use the .js extension matching Node.js source files
command: missing=0; for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/node"/g-node-*; do for kind in positive negative; do [ -d "$d/$kind" ] || continue; n=$(ls "$d/$kind"/*.js 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "${n:-0}" -ge 1 ] || missing=$((missing+1)); done; done; [ "$missing" -eq 0 ] && echo js_extension 1>&2
